case_title: GOMEZ & PATTON A CALIFORNIA CORPOR/C/O GOMEZ STEPH VS FOOTE, WILLIAM D. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ & PATTON A CALIFORNIA CORPOR/C/O GOMEZ STEPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FOOTE, WILLIAM D. FOOTE, ELIZABETH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

REM: POS. AS TO"ELLMAN, BURKE, HOFFMEN & JOHNSON" FILED IN COURT, NOT NAMED ON PLTF'S CLAIMS.
CONT. PER PLTF'S REQUEST TO SERVE DEFTS. AND FILE PROOFS WITH THE COURT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-14-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-01-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
